---
title: "Home"
---

::: {layout="[ [70,30] ]"}
I am professor of Osaka School of International Public Policy ([OSIPP](http://www.osipp.osaka-u.ac.jp/ja/)) at the University of Osaka. My research is principally concerned with the functioning and consequences of the democratic process. My research focuses on political behavior, political representation, survey methodology, and human well-being.

![](matsubayashi.jpg){width="1.8in"}
:::

## Seminars
-   [OSIPP Politics Seminar Series](https://sites.google.com/view/osipp-pss/)
-   [阪大人社系統計実践ワークショップ](https://sites.google.com/view/jinsha-tokei-workshop/%E3%83%9B%E3%83%BC%E3%83%A0)

## News

-   March 2026. Preparing the final version of 入門 現代政治学.

## For prospective students

Please contact me via email if you are interested in studying here at OSIPP. Visit this website for more information. I encourage those who are interested in quantitative analysis of politics, economics, or public health to apply for our master's or doctoral program.
